title: TestAllocationsPerParse/100KB timeout - parser stuck in handleErrorג†’doAllPotentialReductions loop
description: TestAllocationsPerParse/100KB subtest times out after 2 minutes. Parser gets stuck in handleErrorג†’doAllPotentialReductionsג†’tableEntry loop when parsing generated 100KB JSON. Confirmed pre-existing on main (not caused by any recent fix). The test runs 100 iterations of parsing 100KB JSON, and the parser appears to enter an infinite or very long error recovery cycle. Stack trace shows: Parser.Parse ג†’ advanceVersion ג†’ handleError ג†’ doAllPotentialReductions ג†’ tableEntry.
